name: flow-04-feedback-window-controller
description: T66 FeedbackWindowController — PROCESSING archetype. TTL-keyed window: feedback window closes at event end + configured buffer. Never extended.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: ttl-window-close-at-end, never-extended, config-driven buffer
Retrieve PROCESSING arch pattern for T66: TTL-keyed feedback window, time-bounded closure
Break T66 into: on EventEnded → compute TTL (end + buffer from config) → set SETNX window key with TTL → emit FeedbackWindowOpened
Generate feedback-window-controller.service.ts — TTL-keyed window: feedback window closes at event end + configured buffer. Never extended.
Named check validation: ttl_window_close_at_end, no_manual_extension, config_driven_buffer
Score generated code 0-100 against T66 iron rules: TTL window, config-driven buffer, no extension path
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
